purpose: Bounded local normal ControlNet texture-strategy change after v2 did not improve skin or fabric texture. V3 keeps the same RealVisXL checkpoint, ControlNet Union SDXL normal model, prepared BAE normal control image, and normal union control type, but lowers/shortens ControlNet influence, adds a few sampler steps, and anchors the wardrobe to a dark oxford woven shirt rather than a smooth white shirt.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic unretouched editorial portrait, normal-map-guided facial planes and clothing volume, natural skin texture, realistic fine pores, subtle cheek texture, visible skin microcontrast, soft human skin asymmetry, realistic eyes with clean catchlights, clear iris detail, detailed hair strands, dimensional nose cheek jaw and collar geometry, charcoal gray oxford shirt, fine basket-weave cotton texture, visible woven shirt fibers, tailored dark blazer over textured dark shirt, crisp open collar edge, clothed shoulders, quiet neutral studio interior, soft natural fill light, balanced exposure, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, beauty filter skin, airbrushed face, porcelain skin, glossy skin, makeup-ad skin, smeared fabric, smooth fabric, satin shirt, silk shirt, plain white shirt, white dress shirt, blurry collar, distorted anatomy, warped face planes, melted facial geometry, broken collar, deformed shoulders, extra limbs, missing limbs, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, normal map stains, rainbow surface colors, purple green blue normal-map leakage, control map stains, harsh outlines, bare shoulders, strapless top, nude, unclothed torso

qa_focus: dark oxford shirt weave and collar edge detail
face plane and shoulder volume after reduced ControlNet influence
